inputs.label: Renovation Area
inputs.businessContext: Total floor area to be renovated. Standard measure in construction (ISO 9836).

inputs.label: Condition Factor
inputs.businessContext: Current state of the area: poor (major repairs), average (cosmetic), good (minor updates). Based on ASTM E2018 property condition assessment.

inputs.label: Quality Level
inputs.businessContext: Desired finish quality: economy (basic materials), standard (mid-range), premium (high-end). Aligns with RSMeans cost data.

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average labor cost per square meter. Regional variations apply; typical range from BLS data.

inputs.label: Material Cost per m²
inputs.businessContext: Cost of materials per square meter. Based on local supplier quotes and RSMeans.

inputs.label: Contingency Percent
inputs.businessContext: Buffer for unforeseen costs. Industry standard 5-15% (AACE International).

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Reliability of input data: low (estimates), medium (quotes), high (actuals). Affects confidence adjustment.

thresholds.totalCostPerM2 > 300: High cost alert: Consider value engineering.

suggestedActions: totalCostPerM2 > 300 ? 'Consider reducing quality level or negotiating labor rates.' : ''
contingencyPercent > 20 ? 'Re-evaluate risk factors and reduce contingency if possible.' : ''
